feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Baby Bun-Bun
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,233Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 29

Summary: Jason had to grow up fast as a street bunny and was further thrust into serious “adult” life when he became Robin. Dick used to whine about how he’d missed out on the best years of raising his bunny brother. Now that Dick’s dream is finally coming true, he insists on bottle-feeding Jason. It makes Dick feel better, Jason thinks, about having missed out on Jason’s life before Jason died. “Just because you’re grown now doesn’t mean I can’t pamper you,” Dick used to say to him, scritching behind Jason’s ear. Jason would clatter his teeth in a baby bunny purr, and Dick would show his appreciation with a head scritch and a forehead stroke.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,865Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.

entry.title: a grave in the sky (where it's roomy to lie)
entry.summary:
Author: svalas

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,022Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 374

Summary: Nightwing stood up, and the expression on his face made Spoiler step back nervously. His hand unfurled, shaking, revealing a sharp and bloody switchblade. “Somebody was here.” If his voice went any tighter it might shatter. “And we were too late.” (Again, he added in his mind. Then he flinched and had to remind himself—it’s not Jason. Jason’s dead.)or, what might have happened in UTRH if Black Mask was just a bit smarter

entry.title: Hush Little One, You Are Safe Now
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,268Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 1,404

Summary: Damian has tried his best to become the partner that his Father needs, but it seems that his Father does not approve of Robin's style and methods. A night of yelling is enough to set things in motion, were Damain realizes that his Father isn't who he wants to be partners with, but perhaps a certain brother will aid where his Father has not.

entry.title: seven days at wayne mansions
entry.summary:
Author: almostnowandthen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,766Chapters: 3/7Kudos: 53

Summary: Dick, Jason and Tim spend a week in Wayne Mansions in Monte Carlo with Bruce. Except, they're not here on vacation; they're here to Agatha Christie the shit out of their dad, who has, unfortunately, been cloned into multiple near-indistinguishable copies by an interdimensional doppelganger, and it's up to them to find the real Bruce Wayne before time runs out. It's a good thing that they're all professional vigilantes, who would never let their reckless sexual affairs, ongoing commitment issues, or poor parental relationships get in the way of getting the job done.

entry.title: Batcest Baby #1
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,129Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 42

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,280Chapters: 6/16Kudos: 322

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: A Soft Trap
entry.summary:
Author: ya3ani

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,153Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 90

Summary: Wolf!Jason captures bunny!Dick during a war between the Al Ghuls and Gotham. “I’ll give you a choice.” Jason crouches in front of the bunny, one claw-tipped hand pushing Dick’s soft bunny ear away from his face so he can see the raw beauty there. “Mate me; we can rule Gotham together. Or I take you back to the Al Ghuls.”

entry.title: [Podfic] What a Fine Mess
entry.summary:
Author: Rambling_Company

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Authors Summary: Dick Grayson has seen a lot of things, over the years. But if someone had told him a fairly routine night would have ended with him finding his own clone in the form of a young Talon- well, he would have called them crazy. And if they told him he would take the kid home- he would have locked them up for a stint in Arkham. But as wild as it was- well, his life had always been crazy.

entry.title: don't let your heart run away
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,225Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 51

Summary: It all started with this stupid incorrect quotes collection featuring the members of the Robins on Wattpad that Steph sent in the group chat. Surely, no one would blame him for eventually getting curious, right? Wattpad is technically an app for all types of stories, but it's also widely known for its huge amount of fanfiction. Of course, Dick looks up his name first.
